title: BIO Conferences, Workshops, Webinars
content: Conferences, Workshops and Webinars CESTRD : ConferencesWorkshop/Training programs/Webinars/Seminars International Conferences: 3rd International Conference on Biotechnology & Bioinformatics (ICBAB-2026): 27-30 May, 2026. An International Conference on Recent Developments on Interfaces of Chemistry, Biology and Material Sciences towards Health and Environment: 8th -10th October 2024 International Conference on Biotechnology and Bioinformatics (ICBAB-2) July 11-13, 2023 - Report ICBAB-2023: 11-13 July 2023 DST and DBT Sponsored Third National Workshop on Statistical Techniques on Biological and Medical Sciences (STBMS) June 17-23, 2022 A Virtual International Conference on Technologies for Environmental Sustainability and Smart Agriculture: 18th and 19th September 2020 -Flyer - Schedule - News Clipping - Abstract Book International Conference ICBAB: 01 - 03 August 2019 Events of National Significance : World Environment Day Celebration on 5th June 2026 National Conferences and Symposiums: Report of 4th National Science Day Symposium (NSDS) - 2025 3rd National Science Day Symposium (NSDS) - 2024 National Science Day Symposium (NSDS-22): 28.02.2022 Virtual symposium entitled ‘National Science Day Symposium (NSDS-22)’ at Jaypee University of Information Technology (JUIT), Waknaghat, in association with Himachal Pradesh Council for Science Technology and Environment (HIMCOSTE), Government of Himachal Pradesh India on 28th Feb 2022. National Mathematics Day (NMD-2021): 22.12.2021 Virtual symposium entitled ‘National Mathematics Day (NMD-2021)’ at Jaypee University of Information Technology (JUIT), Waknaghat, in association with Himachal Pradesh Council for Science Technology and Environment (HIMCOSTE), Government of Himachal Pradesh India on 22th Dec 2021. Faculty Development Program: One-week Faculty Development Program on Teaching and Research Practices from 05-10th June 2023. Webinars Webinar on 'Career and job opportunities for Microbiology graduates' on 18th July 2023 Webinar on 'Career Prospects in Biotechnology' on 05th July 2023 Webinar on 'Trends and Prospects of Plant Biotechnology' on 19th June 2023 Webinar on 'Genomics in human health and medicine' by Prof. Jata Shankar on 16th May 2023 Prof. Sudhir Kumar delivered an invited WebTalk to B.Sc. final year students of RKMV, Shimla on the topic "Career Opportunities for Graduates in Life-Sciences" on 11th June 2021. Prof. Sudhir Kumar delivered a webinar on Teaching and Learning for school and college faculty of Himachal and other states on 16th January, 2021. A webinar "Biogas From Food Waste: Himachal Pradesh Tackles the Looming Energy Challenge" A webinar was delivered for school, college and Universities faculties on Teaching and Learning by Prof. Sudhir Kumar 17 October, 2020. 75 participants of Himachal and other states attended this webinar in online mode. Webinar BT&BI International Webinar Series (IWS)
